entities.name: STATED CHOICE EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: A research method used to investigate the economic valuation of water quality improvements among rural residents.

entities.name: ECONOMIC VALUATION
entities.description: The process of estimating the economic value of environmental improvements, such as water quality.

entities.name: RURAL RESIDENTS
entities.description: Non-farm residents living in the province of Quebec who are stakeholders in environmental regulations.

entities.name: QUEBEC
entities.description: The Canadian province where the study on water quality valuation was conducted.

entities.name: WATER QUALITY
entities.description: The condition of water, specifically focusing on the reduction of phosphorus and coliform.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL REGULATIONS
entities.description: Stricter rules and policies aimed at improving environmental quality.

entities.name: RISK
entities.description: The uncertainty associated with the outcomes of phosphorus and coliform reductions.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A chemical pollutant whose reduction is a goal for improving water quality.

entities.name: COLIFORM
entities.description: Bacteria whose reduction is a goal for improving water quality.

entities.name: THREE-POINT UNIFORM DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: A statistical method used to introduce risk into the choice sets of the experiments.

entities.name: CONSTANT ABSOLUTE RISK AVERSION
entities.description: A preference model for risk aversion that showed greater support in the study results.

entities.name: CONSTANT RELATIVE RISK AVERSION
entities.description: A preference model for risk aversion compared against the constant absolute risk aversion model.

entities.name: VOLUNTARY COST-SHARE PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs where the government and participants share costs voluntarily to improve water quality.

entities.name: POLLUTER-PAYER PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs where the entities responsible for pollution pay for the environmental cleanup or improvements.
